# AfroTools

> Free financial tools and calculators for all 54 African countries.

## About

AfroTools provides 400+ free tools including PAYE tax calculators, VAT calculators, currency converters, and education tools for African students and professionals. All tools use real tax logic sourced directly from each country's revenue authority. AI Tax Advisor powered by Claude is available on salary tax tools.

## Docs

- [Homepage](https://afrotools.com)
- [All Tools](https://afrotools.com/all-tools/)
- [Blog](https://afrotools.com/blog/)
- [API Documentation](https://afrotools.com/api/)
- [FAQ](https://afrotools.com/faq/)
- [About](https://afrotools.com/about/)
- [Privacy Policy](https://afrotools.com/privacy/)
- [Terms of Use](https://afrotools.com/terms/)

## Tools

- [Nigeria PAYE Tax Calculator](https://afrotools.com/nigeria/ng-salary-tax): Calculate Nigeria take-home pay with NTA 2026 and PITA 2025 tax bands
- [Kenya PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/kenya/ke-paye): Calculate Kenya salary tax with KRA bands and NHIF/NSSF
- [Ghana PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/ghana/gh-paye): Calculate Ghana income tax with GRA bands and SSNIT
- [South Africa PAYE Calculator](https://afrotools.com/south-africa/za-paye): Calculate South Africa income tax with SARS bands and UIF
- [VAT Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/vat-calculator/): VAT calculator supporting all 54 African countries
- [Currency Converter](https://afrotools.com/tools/currency-converter/): Live African currency exchange rates
- [GPA Calculator](https://afrotools.com/tools/gpa-calculator/): GPA calculator for African universities
- [PDF Workspace](https://afrotools.com/tools/pdf-workspace/): Merge, split, compress PDFs
- [CV Builder](https://afrotools.com/tools/cv-builder/): Build professional CVs for African job markets
- [Business Plan Generator](https://afrotools.com/tools/business-plan/): AI-powered business plan for African markets
